study_group_representative.quote: As of 7 April, Vietnam recorded 241 confirmed cases and no fatality.

intervention_and_participants_defined.quote: As of 7 April, Vietnam recorded 241 confirmed cases... Vietnam’s responses are generally in line with current practices of other countries, but they were implemented very early, with great emphasis on case identification, source control and public awareness.

outcome_assessed_for_60pct.quote: As of 7 April, Vietnam recorded 241 confirmed cases and no fatality.

follow_up_length_reported.quote: COVID-19 officially hit Vietnam on 23 January... As of 7 April, Vietnam recorded 241 confirmed cases...

outcome_assessors_blinded.quote: The government has kept the public constantly updated with the outbreak progression and responses via accessible official channels

outcome_definition_objective_precise.quote: As of 7 April, Vietnam recorded 241 confirmed cases and no fatality.

important_prognostic_factors_accounted_f.quote: These positive outcomes result from prompt, proactive actions of the government and collective efforts of the public.

analysis_described_and_effect_quantified.quote: The country has kept the outbreak at a slow growth rate even after reporting 100 cases, with doubling time of more than 7 days, on par with Japan or Singapore (Figure 2, bottom panel).
